text: A street scene in front of a multi-story residential building. The building has a light-colored upper floor and a brown lower floor. Laundry is hanging from the upper windows. A blue and white metal fence runs along the sidewalk. Several people are visible near the fence, including one person riding a bicycle on the right side of the frame.
